products.name: Foley Catheter
products.description: High-quality latex Foley catheter designed for reliable urinary drainage in clinical and surgical settings.

products.name: Ambu Bag
products.description: Manual resuscitator available in Infant, Child, and Adult sizes. Suitable for emergency ventilation support.

products.name: IV Drip Set
products.description: Sterile intravenous infusion set with precision flow regulator for safe and controlled fluid administration.

products.name: Gauze Swab
products.description: Gamma sterile gauze swab for surgical wound care applications. Available in sterilized packaging for clinical use.

products.name: X-Ray Detectable Abdominal Pad
products.description: Gamma sterile abdominal pad with X-ray detectable thread. Designed for safe surgical cavity procedures.

products.name: Electrosurgical Pencil
products.description: High-capacity electrosurgical pencil for precision cutting and coagulation. Manufactured with one of the largest production capacities in India.

products.name: Gauze Swab (ETO)
products.description: ETO sterile gauze swab designed for operating room procedures. Ensures hygienic and contamination-free wound management.

products.name: X-Ray Detectable Abdominal Pad (ETO)
products.description: ETO sterile abdominal pad with X-ray detectable feature. Suitable for high-precision surgical environments.

products.name: Eye Pad Pouch Pack
products.description: Available in Gamma sterile and ETO sterile variants. Individually packed for ophthalmic surgical care.

products.name: Cotton Crepe Bandage (Regular)
products.description: Regular cotton crepe bandage for orthopedic and compression support. Provides flexibility and uniform pressure distribution.

products.name: Combine Dressing Surgical Pad
products.description: Available in Gamma sterile and ETO sterile options. Designed for high-absorbency post-surgical wound dressing.

products.name: Gauze Ribbon
products.description: Gamma sterile gauze ribbon for wound packing procedures. Supplied in hygienic sterile packaging.

products.name: Elastic Adhesive Bandage
products.description: Elastic adhesive bandage available in 10cm x 1m and 10cm x 4/6m sizes. Provides firm compression and superior adhesion.

products.name: Ortho Roll Cast Padding
products.description: Orthopedic cast padding available in 10cm x 3m and 15cm x 3m. Provides cushioning and skin protection under casts.

products.name: Cotton Crepe Bandage (Premium)
products.description: Premium quality cotton crepe bandage for enhanced elasticity and durability. Ideal for long-term orthopedic applications.

products.name: Gamjee Roll
products.description: Available in 10cm x 2.75m and 15cm x 2.75m sizes. Custom sizes can also be manufactured as required.

products.name: Plastic Examination Gloves
products.description: Disposable plastic gloves supplied in pack of 100 pieces. Designed for hygienic medical examination use.

products.name: Surgical Latex Gloves (Powdered)
products.description: Powdered latex gloves available in sizes 6.0, 6.5, 7.0, 7.5, 8.0. Sterile surgical gloves for clinical procedures.

products.name: Nasal Oxygen Cannula
products.description: Available in Infant, Child, and Adult variants. Designed for efficient oxygen delivery therapy.

products.name: Endotracheal Tube
products.description: Available in cuffed and uncuffed variants. Used for airway management in anesthesia and critical care.
